entries.summary: Completed Phase 10: API Server and GUI Polish. Tasks included: adding input validation to API endpoints (Pydantic validators), verifying CORS configuration, standardizing error response formats (removing str(e) from HTTPException details), adding min/max validation to GUI settings, verifying SettingsDialog class structure, and adding thread safety checks to message processor.
top_rejection_reasons: Missing logger.error() call in exception handler
lessons_learned: FastAPI returns 422 for Pydantic validation errors by default - tests should expect this
Error response standardization requires both generic user messages AND detailed logging
Thread safety in GUI requires widget existence checks before updates
